description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional lounge with a modern design, featuring a combination of dark wood framing and plush, gray upholstered cushions. The lounge includes a main seating area with multiple back and seat cushions, a corner section, and a chaise extension for reclining. The backrests are segmented and moderately high, providing ample support, while the armrests are broad and flat, matching the wood frame. In front of the lounge, there is a matching low coffee table and a set of four small, square stools with wooden legs and dark cushioned tops. The overall arrangement is suitable for communal seating in urban parks, plazas, or upscale outdoor lounges. The materials and construction suggest durability and comfort, with a visually striking contrast between the dark wood and soft gray upholstery.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional lounge with gray cushions, dark wood frame, and matching coffee table and stools, designed for communal seating in urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the L-shaped sectional, the chaise extension, and the coffee table with stools in front.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the continuous wood backrest and the arrangement of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full L-shape, the chaise, and the spatial relationship between the lounge, table, and stools.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the main seating area, the segmented backrest, and the coffee table with four stools.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Multiple loose seat and back cushions arranged along the L-shape, including a corner cushion and a chaise section; all cushions are similarly sized and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: Segmented, moderately high backrest with straight lines and no visible tufting or curvature; provides uniform support along the length.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present; broad, flat, and rectangular armrests matching the wood frame, positioned at both ends of the lounge.
attribute_leg_style: Short, blocky wooden legs, square in cross-section, positioned at the corners and under the stools and table; minimal decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric upholstery with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns or tufting; subtle seam lines indicate cushion boundaries.
